spatial: The 'GENERATION 17' text is to the left of the smartphone. The smartphone is positioned on the right side of the frame. Inside the smartphone screen, the photo of the woman is above the text section titled 'Learn about the Global Goals'.
state_changes: Scene shifts from text to Samsung Global Goals app interface.

visible_entities.desc: Smartphone screen displaying an app interface with a photo of a smiling woman in a grey shirt, text sections, and colorful goal icons.
Text graphic 'GENERATION 17' in black font with a row of multi-colored squares underneath.
Text 'Join us.' and 'Visit the Samsung Global Goals app' in black font.
Samsung Galaxy logo in white text on a black background.
UNDP logo (United Nations Development Programme) in white on a black background.

atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a promotional graphic for 'GENERATION 17' on the left side.
A smartphone screen on the right shows the 'Samsung Global Goals' app interface.
The app interface features a section titled 'Updates' and another titled 'Learn about the Global Goals'.
The screen displays specific goal icons including 'Reduced Inequalities' and 'Peace and Justice'.
The video transitions to a black screen showing the Samsung Galaxy and UNDP logos.

ocr: Visit the Samsung Global Goals app
Every day, people are taking action to realize the Global Goals. See what's been going on below.
World leaders agreed to 17 goals for a better world by 2030. These goals have the power to change the world and the people on it.
spatial: The 'GENERATION 17' text and call to action are positioned on the left side of the screen, while the smartphone displaying the app is on the right. Inside the phone screen, the image of the woman is at the top, above the text sections and goal icons. In the final frame, the Samsung Galaxy logo is to the left of the UNDP logo.
